stemHtml:
Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 2".
An aircraft in flight is required to find its position with two DME readings. Connaught DME (CON, 53°55’N, 008°49’W) reads 29 NM, Sligo DME (SLG, 54°17’N, 008°36’W) reads 26 NM. Find its position, assuming that the aircraft is on a heading of 090° with both readings increasing.
